title: Benchmark State
description: Tracks the state of cluster benchmark phases (noise, baseline, treatment) across Stage 5 passes. Created by benchmark-state subcommand on first invocation; updated as phases progress through pending → running → done/failed.

algorithm_name.description: Name of the algorithm being benchmarked (from algorithm_summary.json)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the state file was first created

cluster_context.description: kubectl config current-context at time of creation

pipelinerun_name.description: Name of the submitted PipelineRun (null when pending)

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PipelineRun was submitted (null when pending)

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the phase completed (null when pending/running)

results_pvc_path.description: Path to TraceV2 results directory on the PVC (e.g., noise/, baseline/, treatment/). Each directory contains per-workload subdirectories with trace_header.yaml + trace_data.csv.

results_local_path.description: Local workspace path to converted results after kubectl cp + convert-trace (e.g., workspace/noise_results.json). Null when pending or running.

failure_reason.description: Diagnostic message when status is 'failed' (null otherwise)
